message:
✨ Add local search to all list-based cards (#70)

Phase 2 implementation: Add consistent local search functionality
to all list-based cards for better filtering UX.

Cards updated with local search:
- AlertRules, AppStatus, GPUInventory, GPUWorkloads
- GitOpsDrift, HelmHistory, KustomizationStatus, KyvernoPolicies
- NamespaceQuotas, NamespaceRBAC, OPAPolicies, OperatorStatus
- OperatorSubscriptions, PVCStatus, PodIssues, SecurityIssues
- TopPods, UserManagement

Each card now includes:
- Search icon from lucide-react
- localSearch state with useState
- Filter logic in useMemo with localSearch dependency
- Consistent UI styling with purple focus ring

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+ {/* Policies list */}
